title: alchemilla geranioides var. ducis-aprutii
intro: Alchemilla geranioides var. ducis-aprutii, also known as the Duchy's lady's mantle, is a variety of the alchemilla plant that is native to the Apennine Mountains in Italy. This perennial plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla geranioides var. ducis-aprutii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote the healing of skin wounds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla geranioides var. ducis-aprutii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make a topical paste or applied directly to the affected area.
